title: Action vocabulary term
description: A controlled pharmacological action (mechanism). vocabularies/actions.yaml is a list of these. Free-text action strings in plant records collapse onto one of these ids.

id.description: Stable slug, e.g. anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, vulnerary.

synonyms.description: Free-text variants that map to this action (used during migration and search).

category.description: Optional grouping, e.g. antimicrobial, nervous-system, digestive.

related_conditions.description: Condition ids this action typically addresses (action -> indication bridge).
